_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about climate and the main climate types found in Australia and around the world, like temperate, Mediterranean, and arid climates.

_source.w: We are learning about climate and the main climate types found in Australia and around the world, like temperate, Mediterranean, and arid climates.
y: Understanding climate helps us know what to expect in different parts of the world.
Climate affects everything — what grows, what animals live there, and how people live.
Learning about different climates helps us understand why places look and feel so different.
eg: Comparing the climate of Melbourne (temperate) with Alice Springs (arid).
Looking at a climate map and finding which parts of Australia are the hottest, coldest, wettest, and driest.
Discussing the difference between climate (long-term patterns) and weather (what happens today).
Investigating what a Mediterranean climate is and where it is found in Australia.
Comparing Australia's climate zones with those of a nearby country like Indonesia.
Exploring how climate affects what clothes people wear and what food they grow.
